headline: Citizens Financial: A Comparison Among The Company's Outstanding Preferred Shares
summary: Citizens Financial Group has 3 outstanding preferred shares: CFG.PR.E and CFG.PR.H are fixed-rate preferred shares, while CFG.PR.I is a fixed-rate reset preferred share. Read more here.

headline: Citizens Q3 2026 Business Pulse: Half of Small Business Owners See Growth Ahead Despite Concerns About the Economy
summary: PROVIDENCE, R.I., June 30, 2026--U.S. small business owners head into the second half of 2026 with growing confidence in their own prospects, even as faith in the broader economy continues to drop.

headline: 3 Overrated  Stocks Walking a Fine Line
summary: The stocks in this article are all trading near their 52-week highs. This strength often reflects positive developments such as new product launches, favorable industry trends, or improved financial performance.
